programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover
programme.desc: Phoebe and Max unwittingly let Chloes friends watch a horror movie and eat candy, leaving them traumatized and craving more sugar. Jinx and Boochs parents want to meet with Chloes parents to discuss the lack of supervision at the beach house. With Hank and Barb away, Max and Phoebe are determined to prove they can be good guardians, and use a disguise gadget to transform into their parents to help Chloe. It goes well until the real Hank and Barb show up, and must transform into Max and Phoebe to keep the ruse going.

programme.title: Danger Force
programme.desc: This fun spin-off of Henry Danger is set in the Swellview Academy for the Gifted and follows the adventures of four young friends. Chapa, Miles, Bose and Mika were ordinary kids, until they discovered they have superpowers. They are recruited by Captain Man to become his new crime-fighting crew, and protect the city of Swellview from various villains. But before that Captain Man must teach them how to control their superpowers, as well as to how to work as a team, using Schwoz as his helper.

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: Henry Danger is a story about adventures of a 13-year-old Henry Hart who is lucky to become a helpmate of a super hero Captain Man. This is a real dream job of every teen. The newbie is getting paid for fighting against crime and helping to save the world. Brave Henry must hide his job from his family and friends and it is not that simple, but nothing can stop him from being a true crime-fighter. Henry himself wants to become a super hero one day, that is why he is constantly learning from Captain Man and is not scared of any hardships on the way to his dream.

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Leo, Raph, Donnie and Mikey emerge from the sewers to face challenges alongside April ONeil like never before. When trouble oozes into the streets of New York City, the team finds themselves up against Mechazoids, street gangs, and even the storm of the century! No matter the obstacle, these heroes in a half shell are ready for action with heart and a whole lot of humor.

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: Its another LAD night as the girls plan a sleepover. Seeing their camaraderie makes Jack want to join in, but he doesnt know how when their bond is already so strong. In an attempt to fit in, he promises a coveted but banned drink he overhears Vlad will be smuggling that night. To get it, he takes the girls on a night they never bargained for and gets them all in over their heads, only to realize true bonds can only be formed by time and unforgettable experiences.

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: Living together for the first time, half-siblings Jack and Lily are pushed outside their comfort zones as they learn to coexist while navigating new family dynamics, friends, and endless hijinks all while helping run the familys pet grooming and boarding business. With guidance from their parents and grandmother, the two will learn about each others previously separate lives, blended identity, vibrant culture, and the importance of family.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Lost in Bikini Bottom: On his way to work, SpongeBob attempts to take a shortcut to get there quicker, only to find himself in an abandoned area of Bikini Bottom, and unable to find his way out. Tutor Sauce: After failing his drivers test, SpongeBob consults Mr. Krabs for driving lessons. Even with the experience Mr. Krabs gained from teaching his daughter, SpongeBob would prove it to be a difficult task for Mr. Krabs to teach him.

programme.title: The Marsupilamis
programme.desc: After reading a book by the Twins parents, Bibi learns about Marsupilamis and decides she wants one. The Twins deny Marsupilamis exist, but Bibis convinced they have their own, so starts spying on them. Jade claims a tail that Bibi spots is just a hose, but Bibi wants proof. So Mica sends the Marsupilamis to fetch one-they try to steal Rosas hose but it ends up getting lost, and whilst hunting for it Twister mistakes a Jaguars tail for the hose. The Jaguar then follows them back home where they manage to trap it in their nest, where Bibi encounters it thinking its a Marsup! Scared she declares shes sticking to Puppies in the future.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: Welcome to the Patrick Star Show hosted by Patrick himself and revolving around his extraordinary family and his own bizzare fantasies. Get to know his family, his Dad Cecil Star, his Mom Bunny Star, his sister Squidina Star, and GrandPat Star, and find out where his charm and eccentricity come from.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: When Granny Tentacles goes out for a spa day, Patrick volunteers to watch over her house. In a failed attempt to follow Grannys instructions, Patrick makes his way into her home, then brings Squidina inside too. Between breaking Grannys furniture, tearing out her toilet, and letting a wild animal out of its cage, Patrick destroys the entire house, just as Granny returns home to witness it.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: In this crowded and chaotic household, Lincoln Loud is the only boy among his ten sisters. With eleven children under one roof, things get a little bit crazy sometimes, to say the least. This childrens cartoon is fun and light-hearted, and Clyde, Lincolns best friend, only adds to that. Clyde is an only child by contrast, and is jealous of Lincolns abundance of siblings. Clyde also has a massive crush on Lori, who is Lincolns oldest sister. However, she has a boyfriend, Bobby. Bobby, although not being particularly intelligent, has several different jobs, ranging from life guard, to security at a shopping centre.

programme.title: Wylde Pak

programme.desc: Getting groceries at Woori World always becomes a life-or-death battle. Determined to have a normal shopping trip, Min meticulously plans out every detail. And Will gets locked in a freezer with his arch-nemesis, Mins ex-boyfriend Jonathan. Can they make it out alive... and with all the groceries on Mins list? // Jacks world is turned upside down when he finds out theres a sequel to his favorite art film, A Silent Land. Hes gotta have it! Jack and Lil go on a wild goose chase through town trying to track down the DVD. Finally, a back-alley card game leads them to the mysterious DVD owner, The Collector, a recluse living with thousands of collectibles. He makes a deal with Jack; he can watch the sequel, but hell never escape the Collectors tchotchke-filled lair...

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover
programme.desc: New adventures for The Thundermans unfold after Phoebe and Max are sent undercover to handle a new threat in the seaside town of Secret Shores, and bring Chloe along to develop her superhero talent. While they investigate suspicious activity coming from the local school, Chloe forms a bond with two classmates, who dont realize their new friend has secret powers. As the danger increases, the Thunderman trio must stay in town indefinitely, leaving the squabbling twins in charge of raising their younger sister.

Bobby, although not being particularly intelligent, has several different jobs, ranging from life guard, to security at a shopping centre.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: In this crowded and chaotic household, Lincoln Loud is the only boy among his ten sisters. With eleven children under one roof, things get a little bit crazy sometimes, to say the least. This childrens cartoon is fun and light-hearted, and Clyde, Lincolns best friend, only adds to that. programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover
programme.desc: New adventures for The Thundermans unfold after Phoebe and Max are sent undercover to handle a new threat in the seaside town of Secret Shores, and bring Chloe along to develop her superhero talent. While they investigate suspicious activity coming from the local school, Chloe forms a bond with two classmates, who dont realize their new friend has secret powers. As the danger increases, the Thunderman trio must stay in town indefinitely, leaving the squabbling twins in charge of raising their younger sister.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover
programme.desc: When Max and Phoebe are due to attend Parent-Teacher night at school, Chloe asks to have her friends over to the house unsupervised. Despite being told no, she secretly invites Jinx and Booch over while her guardians are out. At school, Max convinces a reluctant Phoebe to lead an art demonstration for the parents, under the watchful eye of the schools vindictive superintendent. Meanwhile, Jinx discovers the Air Lair, and before Chloe can offer a good cover story, he assumes evil spies are secretly living at their home, and plan to target the parents at the school that night. Jinx races to the school to stop his imagined threat, disrupting Phoebes demonstration and putting the Thundermans cover jobs in jeopardy.

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: Henry Danger is a story about adventures of a 13-year-old Henry Hart who is lucky to become a helpmate of a super hero Captain Man. This is a real dream job of every teen. The newbie is getting paid for fighting against crime and helping to save the world. Brave Henry must hide his job from his family and friends and it is not that simple, but nothing can stop him from being a true crime-fighter. Henry himself wants to become a super hero one day, that is why he is constantly learning from Captain Man and is not scared of any hardships on the way to his dream.

programme.title: Henry Danger

programme.title: Danger Force
programme.desc: This fun spin-off of Henry Danger is set in the Swellview Academy for the Gifted and follows the adventures of four young friends. Chapa, Miles, Bose and Mika were ordinary kids, until they discovered they have superpowers. They are recruited by Captain Man to become his new crime-fighting crew, and protect the city of Swellview from various villains. But before that Captain Man must teach them how to control their superpowers, as well as to how to work as a team, using Schwoz as his helper.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly hosts her own home-grown web show, iCarly. She lives with her twenty-something brother/guardian Spencer and produces her Web casts from a makeshift third-floor loft studio. Grappling with adolescence, she never aimed to gain fame as a rising star/underground celebrity to kids. As events unfold in the pilot, it all happens by accident when a teacher puts her in charge of the school talent show. She and her sassy best bud Sam turn the audition process into a show, which Carlys tech savvy smitten friend Freddy tapes -- including their hilarious banter and great chemistry -- and posts on the Web without telling the girls. The on-line audience clamors for more, and a pop phenomenon blooms, with Carly and sidekick Sams regular Web casts ultimately featuring everything from comedy sketches and talent contests to interviews, recipes, and problem-solving.

programme.title: Victorious
programme.desc: Sitcom about a girl and her life at an elite Hollywood high school for the performing arts. Tori is worried she will forget the words when she is invited to sing the national anthem at a televised basketball game. But Tori should be more concerned about being dragged across the field by the teams mascot - a Saint Bernard dog. She is then asked to sing on a TV show. But when the host tells the audience that he is going to pull a prank on her, can Beck and Andre save her from humiliation?.

programme.title: Rugrats
programme.desc: Tommy spends the night at Phils and Lils and is surprised to learn that theres no "sleep" during a sleepover-only partying! // After Susie rescues Joshs stick sword, he owes her a favor, but none of his attempts to pay her back are very nice.

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Raph is freaking out! He wanted to fight everyone, but now hes up against his brothers, and its the worst. Kitsune and her gang the Purple Dragons captured Mikey, Donnie, and Leo and used mind control devices to send them into the Mutant Battle Arena. They chase Raph through the arena and out to the street where he uses the Turtle Tank as a getaway car. Raph realizes hes in too deep and must turn to an unlikely source for help - the snobby Pigeon Pete! Together, they form a multi-step plan in which Pete will steal the mind control devices right from under the Purple Dragons noses while Raph distracts all the Mutants in the arena. But things dont go quite as planned and its up to Raph to save everyone he loves! Can he find a way to disarm the mind control devices and save everyone before its too late?

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Ray Fillet is attacked in Central Park by a mutant turtle! Donnies busy with his robotics project: turning Metalhead into a spider-bot. Wingnut bursts in and tells the Turtles to come quick- Ray is hurt! A woozy Ray blames the Ninja Turtles, and the Mutanimals start a fight with the confused brothers. But when Rays REAL attacker appears, a mutant snapping turtle named TOKKA, he fights everyone... until his watch starts beeping and he escapes. The Turtles tail him, ending up on the Staten Island ferry. After a big fight, Tokkas trapped. But while questioning him, Tokka explodes into OOZE, leaving only a baby turtle and his watch. Donnies brothers ask him to hack it and find clues about Tokka, which he says is impossible! Later, Donnie gets a location pin from Wingnut and follows it to an abandoned factory on Staten Island. He finds her and ANOTHER TOKKA that he cleverly takes out! Donnie thinks theyre safe until MORE Monster Mutanimals emerge! Could Donnies day get any worse?"

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob SquarePants is a cartoon series starring the yellow sea sponge Spongebob who lives deep in the ocean in the underwater town called Bikini Bottom. Together with his buddy the pink starfish Patrick, he experiences the craziest and most exciting adventures. Spongebob has a very energetic and optimistic character and works as a chef in restaurant "The Krusty Krab" where he makes the best burgers of the bottom of the sea.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants

programme.title: The Marsupilamis
programme.desc: After reading a book by the Twins parents, Bibi learns about Marsupilamis and decides she wants one. The Twins deny Marsupilamis exist, but Bibis convinced they have their own, so starts spying on them. Jade claims a tail that Bibi spots is just a hose, but Bibi wants proof. So Mica sends the Marsupilamis to fetch one-they try to steal Rosas hose but it ends up getting lost, and whilst hunting for it Twister mistakes a Jaguars tail for the hose. The Jaguar then follows them back home where they manage to trap it in their nest, where Bibi encounters it thinking its a Marsup! Scared she declares shes sticking to Puppies in the future.

programme.title: The Marsupilamis
programme.desc: Jade promised to help Mica with his homework, and Gran Gran in the kitchen, whilst being interviewed by Bibi. Things start to go wrong when she accidentally breaks Bibis phone tripod and replaces it with a Marsups tail. Not wanting to let anyone down, Jade relies on the Marsupilamis help, but Hopes almost discovered by Bibi, Punch devours all of Gran Grans fruit salad cups, and Micas volcano project explodes because of the wrong ingredient Jade supplied. Jade learns juggling lots of jobs is tricky!

programme.title: Best and Bester
programme.desc: Best and Bester are a pair of hilariously individual twins who live in a weird and wonderful alternate reality where your neighbour could be a pair of disgruntled trousers or your best friend a floating cloud of bottom burp. But, unlike their friends and neighbours, Best and Bester have the unique ability to choose a new body every single day and, in doing so, experience life in a completely different way.

programme.desc: Po the Panda trains, battles, learns, teaches, stumbles, gabs and ""geeks out"" as the newest hero in the Valley of Peace. Now living in his permanent home at the Jade Palace with the rest of the Furious Five, Po will have to take on new responsibilities and face brand-new adversaries (not seen in the movies) in his continuing education as the Dragon Warrior...for being the Dragon Warrior is not a destination, its a journey (unfortunately for Po, that journey is uphill).

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When Aang has a vision that Katara is in danger, Aang, Sokka, and Toph all rush back to Ba Sing Se to save her. They meet up with Iroh, who asks their help in saving Zuko who had been captured as well. As Aang and Iroh journey to the prison where Zuko and Katara are held, Toph and Sokka go to save the Earth King, but are captured by Azula. Aang and Katara are fighting Azula when Zuko shows up and helps Azula. They are overwhealmed by Zuko, Azula and the Dai Li. Aang prepares to let go of Katara to save her. Aang meditates as he rises in cosmic energy but is struck by Azulas lightning bolt and falls. The gang escapes Ba Sing Se and Katara revitalizes Aang using the water from the Spirit Oasis in the North Pole.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants

programme.desc: Frankie, Phoenix, and Heath search Hadess underworld factory for their missing friends and discover a surprising culprit. // Frankie and friends must "weave their own webs" and battle a foe to save the Monster Fest.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine
programme.desc: It is pure luck to have a genie to fulfill all wishes, to have two of them is something incredible. Leah is a little girl with a genie bottle necklace, which includes Shimmer and Shine, genie twins. Shimmer is a genie with blue eyes and pink hair, encouraging and passionate, she has a pet, a gibbon monkey Tala. Shine is her twin genie with purple eyes and blue hair, big animal lover. Her pet is a little Bengal tiger Nahal. Zac is Leahs neighbor with red hair and blue eyes, and her best human friend. Leah is making three wishes every day, genies are doing their best but the results are far from perfect, as genies are very young and unskilled. This is the source of awkward and comic situations, but in the end girls manage to get over all difficulties.

programme.title: Rusty Rivets
programme.desc: Rusty Rivets is a fantastic and picturesque animated series about Rusty who lives in Sparkton Hills along with his friend Ruby Ramirez, a robotic tyrannosaurid named Botasaur, and a group of smaller robots known as the Bits. Rusty is a smart inventor and a little genius who with the help of his amazing discoveries helps his friends out of difficulties. Rusty constructs robots of different sizes, forms and purposes, he is in love with science, technology and engineering. Together with his friend Ruby they can repair any old machinery and out-of-date equipment. Their splendid intellect arouses envy and toxic rivals do not play the game clean.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Avatar: The Last Airbender is an American animated TV series, set in an Asiatic-like world. Some people there can manipulate the classical elements with psychokinetic variants of the Chinese martial arts. Unlike anybody else, 12-year-old Aang, the Avatar and last survivor of his nation, the Air Nomads, is capable of bending all four elements, his mission is to maintain harmony between the worlds four nations. His flying bison Appa and friends Sokka, Katara, and later on Toph, are by his side on this challenging assignment.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Accidents Will Happen: When Squidward gets hurt on the job, he threatens to take legal action unless Mr. Krabs agrees to cater to him hand and foot. Mr. Krabs and Plankton find a common enemy in the popular new "Flabby Patty" restaurant. Drive Thru: Instead of paying to patch up a hole in the wall of the Krusty Krab, Mr. Krabs decides to use it to make more money by turning it into a drive-thru window. Tony Fast, Jr., the son of a famous race car driver, teaches SpongeBob how to drive.

programme.title: The Casagrandes
programme.desc: Family-orientated cartoon for kids. Ronnie Anne Santiago, her big brother Bobby and their mum have recently moved to Great Lakes City and are now getting used to life in this busy, and sometimes chaotic, new town. Here in the big city they meet the Casagrandes – their extended family made up of grandparents, aunt, uncle, cousins and their pets. Along with a bunch of friends they all live as one big happy family. Skateboarding Ronnie Anne also starts to explore what their new hometown has to offer. Meanwhile, Bobby helps his grandfather Hector working in the family store where they meet lots of interesting characters from the neighbourhood.

Clyde is an only child by contrast, and is jealous of Lincolns abundance of siblings. Clyde also has a massive crush on Lori, who is Lincolns oldest sister. However, she has a boyfriend, Bobby. Bobby, although not being particularly intelligent, has several different jobs, ranging from life guard, to security at a shopping centre.

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Raphaels brothers just dont understand him. Not only does he NEED to fight, hes really good at it, or at least thats what his new boxing trainer named Spuds told him. Spuds even ENCOURAGES Raph to work out his anger and negativity through fighting, even if his family and the annoying Pigeon Pete dont get it. But although the Turtles dont see eye to eye, they must work together to stop a rampaging Rocksteady and Bebop from wrecking the city! Social media blew up with videos of the two Mutanimals going berserk, fighting each other without seeming to know what was going on around them. And all the while, doing some serious damage to the city! As the dust settles, is there someone behind the whole plot, pulling the strings?

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: When Granny Tentacles goes out for a spa day, Patrick volunteers to watch over her house. In a failed attempt to follow Grannys instructions, Patrick makes his way into her home, then brings Squidina inside too. Between breaking Grannys furniture, tearing out her toilet, and letting a wild animal out of its cage, Patrick destroys the entire house, just as Granny returns home to witness it. // Without seeing him, the Star family obliviously smashes up Plankton, leading him to forget who he is. When the injured, amnesic Plankton is saved and adopted by the Dartfish family, it does not take long for him to teach the overly polite family his evil ways. Meanwhile, Karen searches all over town for her missing husband.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: Squidina hires an assistant whos a little too good at his job. ) 18:15 Big Blue Sibling underwater adventurers Lettie and Lemo lead a quirky submarine crew exploring and protecting a vast ocean-covered planet. Can they unravel the mysterious secrets of their underwater universe? 18:30 A Loud House Christmas See The Loud House like never before in this live-action special! Lincoln is planning the ultimate Christmas, but finds out that his sisters have plans to be somewhere else on the big day.

programme.title: Kamp Koral
programme.desc: A young SpongeBob is determined to catch his first jellyfish, so his friends do whatever they can to help him. ) 09:31 Kamp Koral Join SpongeBob and his pals as they spend the summer building underwater campfires, catching wild jellyfish, and swimming in Lake Yuckymuck at the craziest camp in the kelp forest, Kamp Koral! (Subtitled) 09:45 Kamp Koral Join SpongeBob and his pals as they spend the summer building underwater campfires, catching wild jellyfish, and swimming in Lake Yuckymuck at the craziest camp in the kelp forest, Kamp Koral! (Subtitled)

programme.title: Kamp Koral
programme.desc: A prequel to SpongeBob SquarePants, featuring the beloved characters as children, spending their summertime at Camp Coral having fun doing typical camp activities like building campfires, catching jellyfish, and swimming in Lake Yuckymuck, causing a bit of trouble and chaos on the side. SpongeBob SquarePants is a ten-year-old with a red cap, goofy and friendly as hes always been. Lets not forget SpongeBobs friends, Patrick, Sandy, and Squidward, whos a bit older than the others and works as a junior counselor. All other characters such as Mr. Krabs, Mrs. Puff, SpongeBobs nemesis Plankton, and Karen are a part of this adventure as well.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Spongicus: Plankton has demolished the Chum Bucket! In its place, he has built a Roman coliseum and announces there will be a gladiator show, which means togas, chariots, and ferocious lionfish. And on top of all that, its free! No one in Bikini Bottom can resist, not even Mr. Krabs! Suction Cup Symphony: The Bikini Bottom Symphony is accepting submissions for their composition contest, and Squidward is determined to win. He immediately gets to work on his masterpiece, but when SpongeBob and Patrick keep disrupting Squidwards concentration, it looks like they might ruin his chance at musical stardom.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: Patrick presents a show about food after missing out on a hearty breakfast in Late for Breakfast, then in Bummer Jobs, Patrick and SpongeBob experience the wonders of the workforce. ) 09:31 SpongeBob SquarePants The biggest mystery 20,000 leagues beneath the sea is uncovered when SpongeBob and the gang find the lost city of Atlantis, in this special SpongeBob TV movie! Guest starring David Bowie. (Subtitled)

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: Welcome to the Patrick Star Show hosted by Patrick himself and revolving around his extraordinary family and his own bizzare fantasies. Get to know his family, his Dad Cecil Star, his Mom Bunny Star, his sister Squidina Star, and GrandPat Star, and find out where his charm and eccentricity come from.

programme.title: The Casagrandes
programme.desc: Family-orientated cartoon for kids. Ronnie Anne Santiago, her big brother Bobby and their mum have recently moved to Great Lakes City and are now getting used to life in this busy, and sometimes chaotic, new town. Here in the big city they meet the Casagrandes – their extended family made up of grandparents, aunt, uncle, cousins and their pets. Along with a bunch of friends they all live as one big happy family. Skateboarding Ronnie Anne also starts to explore what their new hometown has to offer. Meanwhile, Bobby helps his grandfather Hector working in the family store where they meet lots of interesting characters from the neighbourhood.

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: All of Raphs wildest dreams are coming true in the underground Mutant Battle Arena! He gets to let loose, fighting the massive Mutanimals Bebop and Rocksteady; even the hug-loving Mondo Gecko joins in on the fun! Raph doesnt hold back, and he gets his butt kicked with a smile on his face. Not only that, hes getting some serious bling in exchange for being part of the fights - gold chains, new clothes, even his very own vehicle, the TURTLE TANK! This makes Donnie, Leo, and Mikey very suspicious, since Raph has kept everything a secret from them. But audiences love Raph, which pleases the crime boss Kitsune and her street gang, the Purple Dragons. They run the arena with the help of an obnoxious investor named Knox. But Raphs dream may become a nightmare, as Raph is oblivious to the fact that hes walked right into their trap!

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents: A New Wish
programme.desc: Having filled up another wish card, Hazel is enjoying a fun, fantasy wish. Meanwhile, Cookie, the fairy who got bested by Hazel, Cosmo, and Wanda after their Wish Trials, is setting a trap for our trio. She tricks them into publicly talking about magic at a fake museum exhibit, records the evidence, and then takes them to Fairy Court. Now, Hazel must prove that Cosmo and Wanda are innocent, or else lose them forever. // Frustrated by her moms split attention between work and home, Hazel wishes to be her assistant to spend more time with her. Cosmo and Wanda turn Hazel into an adult, and she spends the day struggling to fulfill her duties. Even though being a working adult is hard, Hazel is excited to be spending so much quality time with Angela. But when the puppet standing in for Hazel at school gets called into the nurses office, Angela rushes off to take care of it and Hazel must give the presentation instead!

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger
programme.desc: Henry Hart is a normal eighth grade student, with an out of school job that takes him on amazing adventures. His cool part time gig as Kid Danger, takes him on out of this world adventures as the sidekick-in-training to famous superhero Captain Man. They go on bizarre and crazy travels, battling criminals and villains that try to attack his hometown and Captain Man himself. Meanwhile at home, Henry has to stay in hiding, keeping his sidekick job as a secret from his best friends, Charlotte and Jasper, and little sister Piper. What exciting adventures will Kid Danger get up to with Captain Man and will be he be able to hide his alter ego from his friends and family?

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: The Fairly OddParents tells us a story of Timmy Turner, a 10-year-old boy in the fictional town of Dimmsdale. Vicky is his babysitter with vicious temper. His parents are completely indifferent to him. His life is very sad and hopeless until his fairy godparents Wanda and Cosmo apperar in the fishbowl and try to fulfill his every wish. Timmys greenness in making his wishes causes troubles and he has to "unwish" them together with his fairy godparents to avoid possible disasters. Enjoy Timmys fantastic adventures in the world of fairies, dragons, unicorns and dwarfs.

programme.title: The Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: The Penguins of Madagascar is an American animated television series, a spin-off of the Madagascar films. The main characters are penguins-commandoes: Skipper, Rico, Kowalski, and Private. They pretend to be white and fluffy but in reality are fearless adrenaline addicts and a secret spy team on a mission to protect their home in the Central Park Zoo. The penguins often have to deal with problems caused by their zoo lemur neighbors- King Julien XIII, Maurice and Mort. The penguins thwart any attempts of King Julien XIII to wield the sceptre of the Zoo.

programme.title: The Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: The opening of a time capsule buried at the zoo a century ago, forces the penguins, Julien, Maurice, Mort, Marlene and Fred into a search for the legendary cursed treasure of the Golden Squirrel, which they must find and destroy before the rats claim it for themselves, but matters are complicated when the treasure includes a curse that will drive those who seek it to fight each other until one who is "pure of heart" claims the treasure.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Po the Panda trains, battles, learns, teaches, stumbles, gabs and ""geeks out"" as the newest hero in the Valley of Peace. Now living in his permanent home at the Jade Palace with the rest of the Furious Five, Po will have to take on new responsibilities and face brand-new adversaries (not seen in the movies) in his continuing education as the Dragon Warrior...for being the Dragon Warrior is not a destination, its a journey (unfortunately for Po, that journey is uphill).

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Avatar: The Last Airbender is an American animated TV series, set in an Asiatic-like world. Some people there can manipulate the classical elements with psychokinetic variants of the Chinese martial arts. Unlike anybody else, 12-year-old Aang, the Avatar and last survivor of his nation, the Air Nomads, is capable of bending all four elements, his mission is to maintain harmony between the worlds four nations. His flying bison Appa and friends Sokka, Katara, and later on Toph, are by his side on this challenging assignment.

programme.title: Monster High
programme.desc: On the night before the election, Clawdeen confronts the shapeshifter and realizes that Headmistress Bloodgood is in danger; The Boo Crew must unite to expose the shapeshifters true identity and ensure that the election goes off without a hitch!

programme.title: Best and Bester
programme.desc: Best and Bester are a pair of hilariously individual twins who live in a weird and wonderful alternate reality where your neighbour could be a pair of disgruntled trousers or your best friend a floating cloud of bottom burp. But, unlike their friends and neighbours, Best and Bester have the unique ability to choose a new body every single day and, in doing so, experience life in a completely different way.

The three feathered friends are always looking for new things to do, zooming around the forest embarking on adventures. With many other animals living in the forest, theres plenty of new characters and creatures for the trio to meet, often involving them on their mischievous escapades. Harvey lives with his parents, Irving Beaks and Miriam Beaks.

programme.title: Wallykazam!
programme.desc: Wallykazam! is about the adventures of Wally Trollman and his pet dragon, Norville. Wally has a magic stick that makes words come to life; each story has a new set of magic words, and Wally uses these words to playfully transform the world around him.

programme.title: Winx Club
programme.desc: Meet Bloom, a girl from Earth, who after she finds out that she is a fairy joins Alfea College on the planet Magix- a magical universe that is inhabited by fairies, witches and other mythical creatures. At Alfea College, fairy warriors from all over the universe study to improve their supernatural powers and here Bloom befriends five other fairies - Stella, the fairy of the Sun, Flora, the fairy of nature, Tecna, the fairy of technology, Musa, the fairy of music and Aisha, the fairy of waves. Together, this group of girls known as the Winx, become best friends and the force to be reckoned with as they experience incredible adventures while defending their universe from varous enemies.

programme.title: Super Duper Bunny League
programme.desc: When the evil King Kneehigh uses one of Steves favorite socks to control him, the bunnies must break him out of his trance before they are de-feeted. // Bex and Steve switch bodies and must learn to appreciate each others powers.

programme.title: The Casagrandes
programme.desc: Family-orientated cartoon for kids. Ronnie Anne Santiago, her big brother Bobby and their mum have recently moved to Great Lakes City and are now getting used to life in this busy, and sometimes chaotic, new town. Here in the big city they meet the Casagrandes – their extended family made up of grandparents, aunt, uncle, cousins and their pets. Along with a bunch of friends they all live as one big happy family. Skateboarding Ronnie Anne also starts to explore what their new hometown has to offer. Meanwhile, Bobby helps his grandfather Hector working in the family store where they meet lots of interesting characters from the neighbourhood.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: In this crowded and chaotic household, Lincoln Loud is the only boy among his ten sisters. With eleven children under one roof, things get a little bit crazy sometimes, to say the least. This childrens cartoon is fun and light-hearted, and Clyde, Lincolns best friend, only adds to that. Clyde is an only child by contrast, and is jealous of Lincolns abundance of siblings. Clyde also has a massive crush on Lori, who is Lincolns oldest sister. However, she has a boyfriend, Bobby. Bobby, although not being particularly intelligent, has several different jobs, ranging from life guard, to security at a shopping centre.

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: All of Raphs wildest dreams are coming true in the underground Mutant Battle Arena! He gets to let loose, fighting the massive Mutanimals Bebop and Rocksteady; even the hug-loving Mondo Gecko joins in on the fun! Raph doesnt hold back, and he gets his butt kicked with a smile on his face. Not only that, hes getting some serious bling in exchange for being part of the fights - gold chains, new clothes, even his very own vehicle, the TURTLE TANK! This makes Donnie, Leo, and Mikey very suspicious, since Raph has kept everything a secret from them. But audiences love Raph, which pleases the crime boss Kitsune and her street gang, the Purple Dragons. They run the arena with the help of an obnoxious investor named Knox. But Raphs dream may become a nightmare, as Raph is oblivious to the fact that hes walked right into their trap!

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Raph is freaking out! He wanted to fight everyone, but now hes up against his brothers, and its the worst. Kitsune and her gang the Purple Dragons captured Mikey, Donnie, and Leo and used mind control devices to send them into the Mutant Battle Arena. They chase Raph through the arena and out to the street where he uses the Turtle Tank as a getaway car. Raph realizes hes in too deep and must turn to an unlikely source for help - the snobby Pigeon Pete! Together, they form a multi-step plan in which Pete will steal the mind control devices right from under the Purple Dragons noses while Raph distracts all the Mutants in the arena. But things dont go quite as planned and its up to Raph to save everyone he loves! Can he find a way to disarm the mind control devices and save everyone before its too late?

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger
programme.desc: Henry Hart is a normal eighth grade student, with an out of school job that takes him on amazing adventures. His cool part time gig as Kid Danger, takes him on out of this world adventures as the sidekick-in-training to famous superhero Captain Man. They go on bizarre and crazy travels, battling criminals and villains that try to attack his hometown and Captain Man himself. Meanwhile at home, Henry has to stay in hiding, keeping his sidekick job as a secret from his best friends, Charlotte and Jasper, and little sister Piper. What exciting adventures will Kid Danger get up to with Captain Man and will be he be able to hide his alter ego from his friends and family?

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Raph is freaking out! He wanted to fight everyone, but now hes up against his brothers, and its the worst. Kitsune and her gang the Purple Dragons captured Mikey, Donnie, and Leo and used mind control devices to send them into the Mutant Battle Arena. They chase Raph through the arena and out to the street where he uses the Turtle Tank as a getaway car. Raph realizes hes in too deep and must turn to an unlikely source for help - the snobby Pigeon Pete! Together, they form a multi-step plan in which Pete will steal the mind control devices right from under the Purple Dragons noses while Raph distracts all the Mutants in the arena. programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: The Fairly OddParents tells us a story of Timmy Turner, a 10-year-old boy in the fictional town of Dimmsdale. Vicky is his babysitter with vicious temper. His parents are completely indifferent to him. His life is very sad and hopeless until his fairy godparents Wanda and Cosmo apperar in the fishbowl and try to fulfill his every wish. Timmys greenness in making his wishes causes troubles and he has to "unwish" them together with his fairy godparents to avoid possible disasters. Enjoy Timmys fantastic adventures in the world of fairies, dragons, unicorns and dwarfs.

programme.title: The Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: The Penguins of Madagascar is an American animated television series, a spin-off of the Madagascar films. The main characters are penguins-commandoes: Skipper, Rico, Kowalski, and Private. They pretend to be white and fluffy but in reality are fearless adrenaline addicts and a secret spy team on a mission to protect their home in the Central Park Zoo. The penguins often have to deal with problems caused by their zoo lemur neighbors- King Julien XIII, Maurice and Mort. The penguins thwart any attempts of King Julien XIII to wield the sceptre of the Zoo.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Avatar: The Last Airbender is an American animated TV series, set in an Asiatic-like world. Some people there can manipulate the classical elements with psychokinetic variants of the Chinese martial arts. Unlike anybody else, 12-year-old Aang, the Avatar and last survivor of his nation, the Air Nomads, is capable of bending all four elements, his mission is to maintain harmony between the worlds four nations. His flying bison Appa and friends Sokka, Katara, and later on Toph, are by his side on this challenging assignment.

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles

programme.title: Transformers: Earthspark
programme.desc: In a world where the Autobots and Decepticons are fighting...Read more for power, a new breed of mutants is caught between the two. These young robots are trying to figure out where they fit in the universe.

programme.title: Monster High
programme.desc: On her birthday, Clawdeen is given her missing mothers amulet, the moon claw it guides her to Monster High. Humans arent allowed, but deep down Clawdeen knows she is one.When an onikuma leads an attack,Clawdeen steps in proving herself.

programme.title: Best and Bester
programme.desc: Best and Bester are a pair of hilariously individual twins who live in a weird and wonderful alternate reality where your neighbour could be a pair of disgruntled trousers or your best friend a floating cloud of bottom burp. But, unlike their friends and neighbours, Best and Bester have the unique ability to choose a new body every single day and, in doing so, experience life in a completely different way.

programme.title: Nella the Princess Knight
programme.desc: Nella the Princess Knight is a British-American animated childrens television series that follows adventurous life of fun-loving and fearless princess Nella who turns into a knight when necessary in order to protect her kingdom. Her main treasure is not her crown but her beloved friends- unicorn Trinket, steed Clod and Sir Garrett. Nella sees that no harm comes to her friends and all other citizens of her kingdom. Together with her friends they have fun, solve mysteries and overcome hardships without which life is impossible even in the happiest kingdom.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Action-packed animation. Four pizza-loving brothers, Raph, Leo, Donnie and Mikey, are mutant turtles who live in the sewers under the streets of New York City. Raph is the oldest of the brothers and also their leader. Leo is the sword-swinging trickster of the team. Donnie is the smartest of the group and Mikey is the youngest brother and also the joker of the bunch. The adventures they go on help them discover their mystic ninja powers and understand the world around them. They learn to work better as a team of heroes. Skills they will need when faced with the enemies who wish to defeat the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles.

programme.title: T.U.F.F. Puppy
programme.desc: Monkey Business: When Birdbrain attempts to kidnap the latest boy band sensation, the Hunky Monkeys, its up to the gang at TUFF to keep them safe. The only problem is Dudley cant stand them! Diary of a Mad Cat:In an attempt to learn more about Kitty, Dudley accidentally sends her diary out in a mass email to everyone in Petropolis. Now that all the villains know Kittys weaknesses, they easily defeat her. Dudley has to convince Kitty that shes super awesome no matter who knows what about her!

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Avatar: The Last Airbender is an American animated TV series, set in an Asiatic-like world. Some people there can manipulate the classical elements with psychokinetic variants of the Chinese martial arts. Unlike anybody else, 12-year-old Aang, the Avatar and last survivor of his nation, the Air Nomads, is capable of bending all four elements, his mission is to maintain harmony between the worlds four nations. His flying bison Appa and friends Sokka, Katara, and later on Toph, are by his side on this challenging assignment.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob SquarePants is a cartoon series starring the yellow sea sponge Spongebob who lives deep in the ocean in the underwater town called Bikini Bottom. Together with his buddy the pink starfish Patrick, he experiences the craziest and most exciting adventures. Spongebob has a very energetic and optimistic character and works as a chef in restaurant "The Krusty Krab" where he makes the best burgers of the bottom of the sea.

programme.title: Ментовские войны. Харьков
programme.desc: Продолжение культового сериала на телеканале 2+2 онлайн. Все фанаты криминальных историй смогут увидеть, как будет разворачиваться сюжет в новом городе, с новыми людьми и преступлениями, которые придется раскрывать умным следователем. Особенно трудно им будут даваться дела, в которых замешаны "оборотни в погонах" - сотрудники структур, которые должны защищать граждан, а не наоборот. Телеканал 2+2 онлайн гарантирует, что новый сериал понравится вам еще больше двух предыдущие проекты, действия которых разворачивались в Одессе и Киеве. К тому же, вы сможете испытать свои силы в решение запутанных дел - вдруг, вы поймете, кто именно является преступником, раньше, чем главные герои сериала? Смотрите 2+2 онлайн, и узнайте все первыми!

programme.title: СуперЖена
programme.desc: Беспрецедентный баттл за титул суперженщины начинается! Каждую неделю 4 обаятельные и привлекательные девушки будут выяснять, кто же из них достоин звания лучшей жены. С понедельника по четверг дамы будут приходить друг к другу в гости, чтобы оценить хозяйственность, саморазвитие и сексуальность конкуренток. Сжульничать и выставить желаемое за действительное им не удастся, ведь за ними будет наблюдать опытный психолог. В пятницу он проведет беседы тет-а-тет и соберет девушек вместе, чтобы расставить все точки над "i".Хитрые манипуляторши, ведические жены, роковые соблазнительницы, яжматери и боевые подруги… Каждая женщина убеждена, что именно ее модель поведения самая правильная. Но кто же из них может покорить не только сердце своего мужчины, но и впечатлить конкуренток?

programme.title: Папа попал
programme.desc: Вас приветствует самое весёлое семейное телешоу "Папа попал". По правилам проекта участником шоу может стать абсолютно любой мужчина, у которого есть уставшая от жизни и бытовых проблем жена, а также минимум двое детей. В то время, как супруга уезжает отдыхать на далёкий и красивый курорт, ее муж начинает принимать на себя все обязанности своей благоверной. На протяжении 7 дней папа должен будет выполнять абсолютно все задания и поручения, которые обычно выполняет его жена. Уборка, стирка, поход за покупками, воспитание детей и поддержание уюта в доме - всё это теперь ляжет на сильные плечи украинских пап. Более того, участники шоу должны будут сделать еще и множество чисто мужских работ, которые долгие годы их просили выполнить их супруги. Починить забор, поклеить обои, отремонтировать автомобиль или научить ребёнка танцевать - всё это также ляжет на плечи наших мужчин-участников. Папа может? Посмотрим!

programme.title: Свадьба вслепую
programme.desc: Право быть счастливым имеет каждый. Но не каждый может осуществить его. "Свадьба вслепую" - это уникальный украинский социальный проект, который поможет разбитым сердцам создать новую крепкую семью. Однако его создатели сразу предупреждают о том, что даже у самой идеальной пары на проекте не всегда гарантирован успех в развитии отношений друг с другом.

programme.title: На троих
programme.desc: Юмористическое скетч-шоу "На троих" - это зажигательные шутки и забавные истории, которые подсказывает сама жизнь. Персонажи "На троих" хорошо знакомы зрителям - это обычные врачи, гаишники, полицейские, офисный "планктон". Новые серии и десятки комических историй - в проекте "На троих" от актеров "Дизель Шоу"!

programme.title: Крепостная
programme.desc: Юная сирота Катерина Вербицкая — очень красивая, умная и образованная девушка. Благодаря ее крестной матери Катю воспитали как барышню благородных кровей. Она знает иностранные языки, играет на фортепиано, рисует и прекрасно понимает, что все это никак не облегчит судьбу рожденной в неволе. Катерина принадлежит самым богатым помещикам в Нежине — Червинским. Девушка существует между двумя мирами — миром крепостных и дворян. И ни в одном из них для нее нет места.

programme.title: Крепостная
programme.desc: Юная сирота Катерина Вербицкая — очень красивая, умная и образованная девушка. Благодаря ее крестной матери Катю воспитали как барышню благородных кровей. programme.title: Двойные ставки
programme.desc: В центре сюжета – судьба молодого парня Игоря Шведова: в первый же день возвращения с фронта на его глазах убивают старшего брата, единственного родного человека. Но неожиданно он узнает, что брат был влиятельным криминальным авторитетом, и подозревает, что люди из его круга – совсем не те, кого из себя выдают. Чтобы найти убийцу брата, он идет на службу в полицию и начинает свою войну с организованной преступностью и оборотнями в погонах.

programme.title: Домик на счастье
programme.desc: Мечтатель-бизнесмен Макс (Константин Войтенко) вместе с женой, столичной фифой Машей (Галина Безрук), переехали из Киева в село Сеньковка. Макс купил страусиную ферму и занимается ее развитием. А Маша только и ждет повода вернуться в столицу. Молодой паре помогают соседи — Василий (Назар Заднепровский) и его жена Люба (Виталий Библив, "Женский доктор"). Но добрыми делами вымощена дорога к форс-мажорам. Ведь на одни и те же ситуации селяне и горожане воспринимают по-разному. Это провоцирует кучу недоразумений, комических ситуаций и плотнее закручивает сюжет....

programme.title: Домик на счастье
programme.desc: Мечтатель-бизнесмен Макс (Константин Войтенко) вместе с женой, столичной фифой Машей (Галина Безрук), переехали из Киева в село Сеньковка. programme.title: Крепостная
programme.desc: Анна заставляет Петра отказаться от продажи Катерины. Ссорится с Катей из-за Алексея, конфликтует и с Петром, угрожая переписать завещание, если его связь с Ларисой опорочит имя семьи. Но об измене Петра уже знают Аглая Юрьевна и Варвара Егоровна - главные сплетницы уезда и подруги Анны. Павлина проговаривается Катерине, что Анна сослала ее отца на каторгу. Катерина передает с Назаром письмо Алексею…

programme.title: Суббота
programme.desc: Юмористический сериал, герои которого - простая семья, на одну из суббот которой пришлась пятнадцатая годовщина свадьбы. На празднование такого важного события съезжается чуть ли не вся семья - дом ломится от родственников. В результате, праздник выходит из-под контроля, и по определенным причинам гостям приходится задержаться дольше, чем кто-либо мог ожидать. Интересно, что некоторые герои украинского сериала на 1+1 были бы не против быстрее уехать домой, но получается так, что каждую субботу происходит нечто, что заставляет задержаться их еще на неделю - и так каждый раз. Как долго один дом сможет выдержать такое количество гостей? А как насчет его хозяев?

programme.title: Суббота

programme.title: Дизель-шоу
programme.desc: Каждый выпуск "Дизель-шоу" - это час настоящего народного юмора в исполнении блестящих резидентов шоу. Среди участников "Дизель-шоу" талантливые актеры, известные КВНщики и самобытные шоумены. Вся команда, бесспорно, прекрасно чувствует друг друга, а потому так легко и непринужденно дарит хорошее настроение своим зрителям. Концерты Дизель-шоу давно уже стали желанным событием в каждом городе Украины, а поэтому билеты на такие мероприятия раскупаются мгновенно. Поэтому лучше купить билеты заранее.

programme.title: Ментовские войны. Харьков
programme.desc: Продолжение культового сериала на телеканале 2+2 онлайн. Все фанаты криминальных историй смогут увидеть, как будет разворачиваться сюжет в новом городе, с новыми людьми и преступлениями, которые придется раскрывать умным следователем. Особенно трудно им будут даваться дела, в которых замешаны "оборотни в погонах" - сотрудники структур, которые должны защищать граждан, а не наоборот. Телеканал 2+2 онлайн гарантирует, что новый сериал понравится вам еще больше двух предыдущие проекты, действия которых разворачивались в Одессе и Киеве. К тому же, вы сможете испытать свои силы в решение запутанных дел - вдруг, вы поймете, кто именно является преступником, раньше, чем главные герои сериала? Смотрите 2+2 онлайн, и узнайте все первыми!

programme.title: Ментовские войны. Харьков
programme.desc: Продолжение культового сериала на телеканале 2+2 онлайн. Телеканал 2+2 онлайн гарантирует, что новый сериал понравится вам еще больше двух предыдущие проекты, действия которых разворачивались в Одессе и Киеве. К тому же, вы сможете испытать свои силы в решение запутанных дел - вдруг, вы поймете, кто именно является преступником, раньше, чем главные герои сериала? Смотрите 2+2 онлайн, и узнайте все первыми!

programme.title: СуперЖена
programme.desc: Беспрецедентный баттл за титул суперженщины начинается! Каждую неделю 4 обаятельные и привлекательные девушки будут выяснять, кто же из них достоин звания лучшей жены. С понедельника по четверг дамы будут приходить друг к другу в гости, чтобы оценить хозяйственность, саморазвитие и сексуальность конкуренток. Сжульничать и выставить желаемое за действительное им не удастся, ведь за ними будет наблюдать опытный психолог. В пятницу он проведет беседы тет-а-тет и соберет девушек вместе, чтобы расставить все точки над "i".Хитрые манипуляторши, ведические жены, роковые соблазнительницы, яжматери и боевые подруги… Каждая женщина убеждена, что именно ее модель поведения самая правильная. Но кто же из них может покорить не только сердце своего мужчины, но и впечатлить конкуренток?

programme.title: Папа попал
programme.desc: Вас приветствует самое весёлое семейное телешоу "Папа попал". По правилам проекта участником шоу может стать абсолютно любой мужчина, у которого есть уставшая от жизни и бытовых проблем жена, а также минимум двое детей. В то время, как супруга уезжает отдыхать на далёкий и красивый курорт, ее муж начинает принимать на себя все обязанности своей благоверной. На протяжении 7 дней папа должен будет выполнять абсолютно все задания и поручения, которые обычно выполняет его жена. Уборка, стирка, поход за покупками, воспитание детей и поддержание уюта в доме - всё это теперь ляжет на сильные плечи украинских пап. Более того, участники шоу должны будут сделать еще и множество чисто мужских работ, которые долгие годы их просили выполнить их супруги. Починить забор, поклеить обои, отремонтировать автомобиль или научить ребёнка танцевать - всё это также ляжет на плечи наших мужчин-участников. Папа может? Посмотрим!

programme.title: Свадьба вслепую
programme.desc: Право быть счастливым имеет каждый. Но не каждый может осуществить его. "Свадьба вслепую" - это уникальный украинский социальный проект, который поможет разбитым сердцам создать новую крепкую семью. Однако его создатели сразу предупреждают о том, что даже у самой идеальной пары на проекте не всегда гарантирован успех в развитии отношений друг с другом.

programme.title: На троих
programme.desc: Юмористическое скетч-шоу "На троих" - это зажигательные шутки и забавные истории, которые подсказывает сама жизнь. Персонажи "На троих" хорошо знакомы зрителям - это обычные врачи, гаишники, полицейские, офисный "планктон". Новые серии и десятки комических историй - в проекте "На троих" от актеров "Дизель Шоу"!

programme.title: Крепостная
programme.desc: Анна заставляет Петра отказаться от продажи Катерины. Ссорится с Катей из-за Алексея, конфликтует и с Петром, угрожая переписать завещание, если его связь с Ларисой опорочит имя семьи. Но об измене Петра уже знают Аглая Юрьевна и Варвара Егоровна - главные сплетницы уезда и подруги Анны. Павлина проговаривается Катерине, что Анна сослала ее отца на каторгу. Катерина передает с Назаром письмо Алексею…

programme.title: Крепостная
programme.desc: Юная сирота Катерина Вербицкая — очень красивая, умная и образованная девушка. Благодаря ее крестной матери Катю воспитали как барышню благородных кровей. Она знает иностранные языки, играет на фортепиано, рисует и прекрасно понимает, что все это никак не облегчит судьбу рожденной в неволе. Катерина принадлежит самым богатым помещикам в Нежине — Червинским. Девушка существует между двумя мирами — миром крепостных и дворян. И ни в одном из них для нее нет места.

programme.title: Двойные ставки
programme.desc: В центре сюжета – судьба молодого парня Игоря Шведова: в первый же день возвращения с фронта на его глазах убивают старшего брата, единственного родного человека. Но неожиданно он узнает, что брат был влиятельным криминальным авторитетом, и подозревает, что люди из его круга – совсем не те, кого из себя выдают. Чтобы найти убийцу брата, он идет на службу в полицию и начинает свою войну с организованной преступностью и оборотнями в погонах.

programme.title: Домик на счастье
programme.desc: Мечтатель-бизнесмен Макс (Константин Войтенко) вместе с женой, столичной фифой Машей (Галина Безрук), переехали из Киева в село Сеньковка. Макс купил страусиную ферму и занимается ее развитием. А Маша только и ждет повода вернуться в столицу. Молодой паре помогают соседи — Василий (Назар Заднепровский) и его жена Люба (Виталий Библив, "Женский доктор"). Но добрыми делами вымощена дорога к форс-мажорам. Ведь на одни и те же ситуации селяне и горожане воспринимают по-разному. Это провоцирует кучу недоразумений, комических ситуаций и плотнее закручивает сюжет....

programme.title: Суббота
programme.desc: Юмористический сериал, герои которого - простая семья, на одну из суббот которой пришлась пятнадцатая годовщина свадьбы. На празднование такого важного события съезжается чуть ли не вся семья - дом ломится от родственников. В результате, праздник выходит из-под контроля, и по определенным причинам гостям приходится задержаться дольше, чем кто-либо мог ожидать. Интересно, что некоторые герои украинского сериала на 1+1 были бы не против быстрее уехать домой, но получается так, что каждую субботу происходит нечто, что заставляет задержаться их еще на неделю - и так каждый раз. Как долго один дом сможет выдержать такое количество гостей? А как насчет его хозяев?

programme.title: Суббота

programme.title: Дизель-шоу
programme.desc: Каждый выпуск "Дизель-шоу" - это час настоящего народного юмора в исполнении блестящих резидентов шоу. Среди участников "Дизель-шоу" талантливые актеры, известные КВНщики и самобытные шоумены. Вся команда, бесспорно, прекрасно чувствует друг друга, а потому так легко и непринужденно дарит хорошее настроение своим зрителям. Концерты Дизель-шоу давно уже стали желанным событием в каждом городе Украины, а поэтому билеты на такие мероприятия раскупаются мгновенно. Поэтому лучше купить билеты заранее.

В пятницу он проведет беседы тет-а-тет и соберет девушек вместе, чтобы расставить все точки над "i".Хитрые манипуляторши, ведические жены, роковые соблазнительницы, яжматери и боевые подруги… Каждая женщина убеждена, что именно ее модель поведения самая правильная. Но кто же из них может покорить не только сердце своего мужчины, но и впечатлить конкуренток?

programme.title: Папа попал
programme.desc: Вас приветствует самое весёлое семейное телешоу "Папа попал". По правилам проекта участником шоу может стать абсолютно любой мужчина, у которого есть уставшая от жизни и бытовых проблем жена, а также минимум двое детей. В то время, как супруга уезжает отдыхать на далёкий и красивый курорт, ее муж начинает принимать на себя все обязанности своей благоверной. На протяжении 7 дней папа должен будет выполнять абсолютно все задания и поручения, которые обычно выполняет его жена. Уборка, стирка, поход за покупками, воспитание детей и поддержание уюта в доме - всё это теперь ляжет на сильные плечи украинских пап. Более того, участники шоу должны будут сделать еще и множество чисто мужских работ, которые долгие годы их просили выполнить их супруги. Починить забор, поклеить обои, отремонтировать автомобиль или научить ребёнка танцевать - всё это также ляжет на плечи наших мужчин-участников. Папа может? Посмотрим!

programme.title: Свадьба вслепую
programme.desc: Право быть счастливым имеет каждый. Но не каждый может осуществить его. "Свадьба вслепую" - это уникальный украинский социальный проект, который поможет разбитым сердцам создать новую крепкую семью. Однако его создатели сразу предупреждают о том, что даже у самой идеальной пары на проекте не всегда гарантирован успех в развитии отношений друг с другом.

programme.desc: Get ready for a flirty and fun sensual journey with the dazzling Victoria in an exclusive photoshoot for Playboy TV Europe! A perfect mix of attitude, allure, and light-hearted seduction—sensuality has never been so fun!

programme.title: Elka
programme.desc: In her vibrant studio in the south of France, painter Elka Leonard reshapes the female myth with bold colors, erotic symbolism, and a disarming sense of freedom. Self-taught and fiercely independent, she creates powerful, sensual narratives where women are not objects but protagonists — sovereign, desiring, and unapologetically alive. The film immerses us in her creative process: explosive pigments, poetic fragments, surreal imagery, and intimate painting sessions with nude models. Through these moments, Elka reveals a universe where sensuality becomes political, where the body becomes language, and where art rewrites the stories women have been denied. Elka Leonard: Chronicle of a New Mythology is the portrait of an artist reinventing the feminine divine — with paintings that burn, question, and seduce.

programme.title: Eternal Allure
programme.desc: Timeless beauties bare it all throughout locations worldwide.

programme.title: Ladies First
programme.desc: Enter the intimacy of @emilie.bellule, @margot.dulac. They tell you their biggest fantasies without any restraint. You will know everything about their preferences and their secrets.

programme.title: Backstage of the Photoshoot
programme.desc: Step into the romantic and playful world of Gleb and Valerie in an exclusive photoshoot for Playboy TV Europe. Upon arriving at the set, the magnetic male model and the enchanting female muse are complete strangers, but sparks fly as a captivating chemistry quickly ignites under the professional gaze of talented Evgenii Serezvin. Together, they revisit a classic romantic comedy, exploring the secret and taboo love between coworkers! And as the atmosphere shifts into a dimly lit, sensual night, all fantasies are free to unfold.

programme.title: Biig Tiime - Le Potrait
programme.desc: A product of both Caribbean culture and hip-hop culture, photographer Biig Tiime takes you through the key stages of his journey. From his childhood in Martinique to his artistic studies at the Beaux-Arts in Paris, and of course, behind the scenes during his photo shoots, youll get an inside look at the number one photographer in France when it comes to vixen photography.

programme.title: Unfiltered
programme.desc: For this episode of Unfiltered, the photographer returns to Amsterdam for a new photo shoot on the theme: Social Media - The Lie of Perfection". He works with Deelee, a charismatic model who also hosts her own radio show, where she openly discusses sex. The shoot, set in a cozy apartment in the city at dusk, promises an intimate atmosphere. The photographers goal is to reveal whats behind the perfect image of a flawless, naked body. To achieve this, he has devised a bold scene, playing on the contrast between Deelees sensual appearance and the reality beneath it. A message that is both serious and provocative, conveyed through a work that will captivate the mind.

programme.title: Playboys Amateur Girls
programme.desc: Join Playboy TV for the ultimate celebration of untapped beauty. Playboys Amateur Girls is showcasing college coeds, Cyber Girls, sexy wives, and tons more. Every week, were bringing gorgeous women to our hallowed studios and filming them au natural.

programme.title: Workshop Vagabond Vacations
programme.desc: JONA ​​and JC, our faithful vloggers, continue to surprise us! This time, they organize crazy photoshoots all over the world! Incredible models, dreamscapes, international photographers... With their touch of humor that we all know well, they make us live their adventures as directors, photographers and lovers. In this first episode, well discover a small Mexican paradise: Puerto Vallarta!

programme.title: Naked Happy Girls
programme.desc: The concept was originally based on the photography book, Naked Happy Girls, created by Andrew Einhorn. The New York-based photographer built his work around the premise of shooting real women from the city undressed and in very intimate moments.

programme.title: Vagabond Girls
programme.desc: Yaroslava embodies a singular kind of strength both gentle and powerful. A jiu-jitsu champion and weightlifting master, she opens up to Nata in an intimate conversation, revealing how sport, passed down through her family, helped her fully discover herself. Guided by Natas thoughtful questions, this episode paints a tender and sensual portrait of a woman shaped by the strength of both heart and body

programme.title: Playboy Girlfriends
programme.desc: Erotica/Adult Entertainment.

programme.title: Shooting in Abidjan
programme.desc: The famous Ivorian photographer Macao Park makes us discover the backstage of a photo shooting in Abidjan! 2 sublime Ivorian models, Audrey and Mariam are going to be transformed into real African queens at the edge of the beach of Bassam!

programme.title: Sexomnia
programme.desc: Lara learns that a new maid has an unexpected connection to her past.

programme.title: Female Gaze
programme.desc: After several years as a model, Mathilde moves behind the camera and starts photographing her friends, lovers... offering a personal perspective on the evolution of sexualities and genders.

programme.title: Portrait de
programme.desc: Anna Polina shares her journey, her evolution, her dreams. She becomes the face of Dorcel at just 21 years old. As a director, she expresses her freedom. Follow her in this candid portrait where you can witness an exclusive shoot with Alex Craig.

programme.desc: King of Kings, one of the most recognizable brands in the world of kickboxing, returns to live action on FightBox HD. KOK brings the most dedicated fans to the biggest arenas in the world to create an amazing spectacle.

programme.title: Kickboxing: KOK World Series
programme.desc: Enjoy all the action and drama from the these competition bouts between the latest crop of top kickboxing fighters as they go toe-to-toe in this adrenalin-packed showcase. All of your favourite fight stars will be making an appearance including current heavyweight champ Dzevad Poturak from Bosnia. The nine contests across all weight divisions feature fighters from Bosnia and Herzegovina, the Republic of Serbia, and Montenegro.

programme.title: Dzīvīte
programme.desc: Raidījumā tiks apskatītas dažādas tēmas un noskaidrotas atbildes uz neskaidriem sadzīves jautājumiem, piemēram, juridiskas dabas vai par sociāliem pakalpojumiem. Sadarbībā ar vadošo ārstniecības iestāžu speciālistiem tiks stāstīts arī par medicīnas aktualitātēm, veselību un veselīgu dzīvesveidu, kā arī citām svarīgām lietām.

programme.title: Spried ar Delfi
programme.desc: Katru darba dienu kopā ar dažādu nozaru speciālistiem, kā arī "Delfi" un citu mediju žurnālistiem aicinām skatītājus spriest par kādu aktuālu tematu - politiķu lēmumiem un to sekām, amatpersonu rīcību un tās motīviem, pārmaiņām sabiedrībā un tās virzītām iniciatīvām, pasaulē notiekošo un tā ietekmi uz Latviju, sasniegumiem un zaudējumiem sportā, kultūras personībām un procesiem.

programme.title: Gaidām ciemos!
programme.desc: "Gaidām ciemos!" ir par dažādu valstu kultūru, vēsturi un tradīcijām. Raidījuma vadītājs Zurabs Dvaļi ceļo un aicina skatītājus kopā ar viņu pastaigāties pa skaistām vietām, novērtēt apskates vietas, apbrīnot dabu un satikt interesantus cilvēkus. Skatītāji vispirms uzzinās interesantus vēstures faktus par dažādu valstu slavenākajiem vai aizmirstākajiem reģioniem, bet pēc tam izzinās kulinārijas tradīcijas, kopā ar raidījuma viesiem gatavojot vairākus ēdienus.

programme.title: Manas jaunās mājas Latgale
programme.desc: Viņas lēmums pārcelties no Rīgas uz Latgali, pašā Latvijas pierobežā, daudziem šķita neapdomīgs. Daži pat iesmēja, un ģimene uztraucās, jo tas bija liels izaicinājums. Taču Vitu tas neapturēja. Pirms divpadsmit gadiem Vita Ruduša pārcēlās no Rīgas uz Ludzu-Ciblu, uz sava tēva dzimtajām mājām. Ludzā viņu jau gaidīja darbs Valsts probācijas dienestā, un drīz vien izplatījās ziņas par viņas talantiem. Vita ir profesionāla koklētāja, kas Latgalē ir retums, kā arī komponiste. Viņas radītie darbi skan Vispārējos latviešu Dziesmu un Deju svētkos.

programme.title: Trīs kvadrātā
programme.desc: Atklāto sarunu cikla "Trīs kvadrātā" pirmajā raidījumā Mārtiņš Vilsons tiksies ar trīs paaudžu baletdejotājām. Jaunāko paaudzi pārstāvēs jaunā, daudzsološā Latvijas Nacionālā baleta soliste Emma Lagūna (24). Dzimusi Liepājā. 2022. gadā par dalību izrādēs "Gulbja ezers", "Apburtā princese" un "Serenāde" saņēmusi prestižo Dejas balvu kategorijā "Jaunie dejas mākslinieki". Vidējās paaudzes lomā uz sarunu tiks aicināta Elza Leimane (40) - Latvijas Nacionālās operas vadošā baleta soliste. Horeogrāfe. Starptautisko konkursu dalībniece un laureāte, vairāku nacionāla mēroga apbalvojumu īpašniece. Kā balerīna un horeogrāfe saņēmusi ovācijas teju neskaitāmās pasaules valstīs. Izcilo baletmākslinieku Aivara Leimaņa un Guntas Leimanes meita. Kā baleta leģenda sarunai pievienosies Zita Errs (72). Latvijas nacionālā baleta primabalerīna. Baleta pasniedzēja, repetitore un Latvijas Mūzikas akadēmijas asociētā profesore. Viena no visspilgtākajām, cildināmākajām un apbalvojumiem apveltītākajām balerīnām Latvijas baleta vēsturē.

programme.desc: 02:15 Jēkabpils laiks (Vidusdaugavas TV); 02:30 Skats no Ventspils (Kurzemes TV); 02:45 TV Kurzeme piedāvā; 03:00 Vakar, šodien, rīt (TV9 Pakalni)

programme.title: Spried ar Delfi
programme.desc: Katru darba dienu kopā ar dažādu nozaru speciālistiem, kā arī "Delfi" un citu mediju žurnālistiem aicinām skatītājus spriest par kādu aktuālu tematu - politiķu lēmumiem un to sekām, amatpersonu rīcību un tās motīviem, pārmaiņām sabiedrībā un tās virzītām iniciatīvām, pasaulē notiekošo un tā ietekmi uz Latviju, sasniegumiem un zaudējumiem sportā, kultūras personībām un procesiem.

programme.title: Āzija
programme.desc: Volgas reģiona un Melnās jūras Ziemeļu reģiona vāciešus sauc par "cilvēkiem ceļā". 19.gadsimtā viņi tika izsūtīti uz Vidusāziju. Mazajā Kirgizstānas pilsētiņā Talasā to bija vairāk nekā 100 tūkstoši. Viņi veidoja vācu apmetnes nomadu tautu teritorijā.

programme.title: Meža veča emuāri
programme.desc: Toras upīte tiek kopta kā nākas. Raidījumā "Meža veča emuāri" redzēsim, kā tas izskatās un uzzināsim, kāpēc nepieciešami nosēdbaseini un gultnes uzlabošana šai Āģes pietekai. Skaidrosim un pētīsim uz vietas te un tagad.

programme.title: Tikšanās vieta. Valmieras novads
programme.desc: Vēlies uzzināt kas notiek Valmieras novadā? Šis ir raidījums, kurā par to vari uzzināt visu. Aktualitātes, jaunumi un notikumi.

programme.title: ReTV Ziņas
programme.desc: Informācijas līderis reģionos - ReTV. Jaunākās ziņas katru darbdienu 15.00, 19.00 un 21.00.

programme.title: Copes Frekvence
programme.desc: "Copes frekvences" komanda Kārlis, Renārs un Gunārs dodas pēc pavasara līdakām! Bez ekrāniem, bez laivām, pa mazām upēm un purva grāvjiem. Nonāk 3 galaktikās, piedzīvo sauli un lietu, satiek purva līdakas!

programme.title: Izšķirtspēja
programme.desc: Naida maigākās versijas ir aizkaitinājums un nepatika. Tomēr, ja sasniegta robeža, kad vairs nekautrējamies teikt - ienīstu! - jāatceras, ka nedrīkstam kļūt par visaptverošu negatīvu emociju nesējiem. Kā nodalīt rīcību no sajūtām, saprotot, kas ir pieņemami, kas jau ir ārpus mūsu pieļaujamā un grauj vērtību sistēmu? Saruna ar RSU Psihosomatiskās medicīnas un psihoterapijas klīnikas ārstu psihoterapeitu Ernestu Pūliņu-Cini.

programme.title: Svētku kūka
programme.desc: Šodienas raidījums ir veltīts īpašiem mirkļiem - tiem, ko atceramies visu mūžu. Un kas gan var būt simboliskāks par kāzu torti - kūku, kas iemieso mīlestību, jaunu sākumu un kopā būšanu. Kāzu torte nav tikai deserts - tā ir svētku centrālais akcents, kas apvieno skaistumu, garšu un emocijas. Šodien parādīsim, kā dekorēt gardu svētku torti, kas būs cienīga jebkurām kāzām. Ilze Kupča Kūciņa pārsteigs ikvienu mājas kūku mīļotāju un pierādīs, ka tas ir iespējams ikvienam! Kopā ar skaisto kāzu torti dosimies ciemos uz īstām Latgaļu kāzām. Tā ir komēdijizrāde "Kāzas Latgalē" - 24 stundu trakākais piedzīvojums jaunā pāra mūžā. Šo grandiozo kāzu vadītājs ir aktieris Imants Strads. Skaidrosim, kādas tad ir īstas Latgaļu kāzas? Un uzzināsim vai aktierim bieži nākas pašam vadīt kāzas? Uzzināsim arī kādu kāzu atgadījumu.

programme.title: Meža stāsti
programme.desc: Jāzeps Gavars - Meža sirdspuksti no Kategrādes Viņš reiz aizlaidās no pilsētas uz Latgales biezokņiem. Tagad no ciemata palicis tikai nosaukums - Kategrāde. Ozoli viņa mežā ir izaudzēti no zīlēm, kas vāktas maisiņos Rīgas parkos. Šodien koku bērni, jau brangi un kopjami. Viņš nelūzt vēja brāzmas, arī tad, kad nodega paša celtā māja. Viņa mazbērni bija blakus arī tad, kad pašu rokām cela to atpakaļ. Šis Meža stāsts būs par vīru, kuram Latvijas karogs 85 mūža gadus sirdī iekalts.

programme.title: Spried ar Delfi
programme.desc: Katru darba dienu kopā ar dažādu nozaru speciālistiem, kā arī "Delfi" un citu mediju žurnālistiem aicinām skatītājus spriest par kādu aktuālu tematu - politiķu lēmumiem un to sekām, amatpersonu rīcību un tās motīviem, pārmaiņām sabiedrībā un tās virzītām iniciatīvām, pasaulē notiekošo un tā ietekmi uz Latviju, sasniegumiem un zaudējumiem sportā, kultūras personībām un procesiem.

programme.title: Mēs darām tā
programme.desc: Katrs no videostāstiem seko līdzi galveno varoņu dienas gaitām, īpašu vērību pievēršot viņu iestrādātajai zaļā dzīvesstila rutīnai, kas saistīta gan ar saimniekošanu mājās, darbā un dārzā, atkritumu šķirošanu, enerģijas avotu un transporta izvēli, ēšanas paradumiem, darba pienākumu organizēšanu un atpūtu. Tie ļauj ielūkoties, piemēram, šobrīd Rīgā lielākās apkaimes biedrības pārstāvju ikdienā, kuri Grīziņkalnā rūpējas par zaļas un labiekārtotas ārtelpas izveidi, kā arī Pierīgas novadu mājsaimniecībās, vērtējot dažādu apkures veidu efektivitāti un draudzīgumu videi, dažādu mākslinieku saimniekošanas paradumos u.c. Raidījumu vada aktrise un kostīmu māksliniece Madara Botmane, iepazīstinot ar planētai draudzīga dzīvesstila ikdienas paradumiem Latvijas kopienās, komūnās, kolektīvos, apkaimēs un vairāku paaudžu ģimeņu mājvietās.

programme.title: Zaļā gaisma
programme.desc: Auto, drošība uz ceļa, jaunāko noteikumu un likumu skaidrojumi. Raidījumā pastāstīsim par jaunākajām aktualitātēm, kas jāzina un jāņem vērā katram autovadītājam.

programme.title: Kursu kari
programme.desc: Rīgas Mākslas un mediju tehnikuma skolēnu veidota erudīcijas un jautrības spēles "Kursu Kari"

programme.title: DoMMājas stāsti
programme.desc: Kāpēc joprojām bieži dzirdam apgalvojumu, ka augstskola ir tikai teorija, kas īstajā dzīvē maz palīdz? Kā komandā atpazīt un mainīt neproduktīvu komunikāciju? Ko patiesībā nozīmē "stikla griesti" vadītāja amatā, un vai frāze "es nezinu" no vadītāja mutes ir vājuma pazīme vai brieduma apliecinājums? "DoMMājas stāstu" otrās sezonas 6. epizodē Aija Iesalniece sarunājas ar Vidzemes augstskolas akadēmisko prorektori Ievu Zaumani. Saruna par pieredzi, kas balstīta ne tikai akadēmiskos pētījumos, bet arī praktiskā komandu vadībā un uzņēmumu vadītāju konsultēšanā.

programme.title: Piedzīvojums dabā
programme.desc: Piedzīvojumu meklētājs Jānis Kļaviņš dodas jaunajā un vēl nezināmajā, izpētot dabu pārgājienos. Cilvēks ir viena no vides sastāvdaļām, kas veido to kopumu. Ar piemēriem vēlamies parādīt, kā cilvēks var, veiksmīgi integrējoties vidē, vadīt savu saimniecisko darbību. Veidot cilvēku izpratni, dodoties Latvijas dabā, izglītojot un informējot iespējami plašu sabiedrības daļu par dažādo ekosistēmu un sniedzot praktiskus padomus, kā izmantot dabas resursus, nepiesārņojot un saglabājot vides kvalitāti.

programme.title: Latvijas stāsti
programme.desc: Rimanta Liepiņa vārds pēdējos desmit gadus saistīts ar Latvijā populāro taku skrējienu "Stirnu buks", kas šo gadu laikā organizēts daudzās Latvijas pilsētās. Caur dabiem viņš apliecina savu dzīļo mīlestību pret Latviju, tostrap jau trešo gadu 18. novembrī organizējot Latvijas Gaismas ceļu, kad no trīs mūsu valstī nozīmīgiem ezeriem - Usmas, Rāznas un Burtnieka - ar lāpām rokās skrējēji devās uz Likteņdārzu.
